config.questsPerDay.tooltip: How many quests appear on the board each day.
config.questDeadline.tooltip: Number of days to complete each quest before it expires.
config.difficultyScaling.tooltip: When enabled, quests scale in difficulty based on your skill levels and years played.
config.consequences.tooltip: When enabled, some quests can affect NPC friendships positively or negatively depending on the quest and the NPC's personality.
config.moddedItems.tooltip: When enabled, quest objectives can include items added by other mods.
config.moddedNPCs.tooltip: When enabled, modded NPCs can appear as quest givers or be affected by consequences.
config.festivalQuests.tooltip: When enabled, special quest chains appear in the days leading up to festivals.
config.festivalLeadDays.tooltip: How many days before a festival the pre-festival quests start appearing.
config.animalQuests.tooltip: When enabled, building a coop or barn triggers special animal-related quest chains from Marnie.
consequence.fishing.moderate: {{npc}} doesn't seem happy about all the fish being pulled from the water lately.
consequence.fishing.significant: {{npc}} is upset. "Don't you think the fish population needs time to recover?"
consequence.cooking.hate: {{npc}} wrinkles their nose. "I can't stand {{item}}, honestly."
consequence.cooking.love: {{npc}} lights up. "Oh, I love {{item}}! That's wonderful."
mail.marnie.coopBuilt: Dear @,^Congratulations on building your first coop! I have some advice on raising chickens if you're interested. Stop by the ranch when you get a chance.^  -Marnie
mail.marnie.barnBuilt: Dear @,^I see you've got a barn now! That's exciting. I've got a little task for you if you're up for it -- come see me at the ranch.^  -Marnie
mail.robin.bigCoopUpgrade: Hey @,^Nice upgrade on the coop! I've been thinking about a project that could use your help. Swing by the shop when you have time.^  -Robin
mail.marnie.deluxeBarnUpgrade: Dear @,^A deluxe barn -- look at you, becoming a real rancher! I have something special in mind. Visit me at the ranch soon.^  -Marnie
